          "2:LEN": "README.md\npyproject.toml\nsrc/miniqueue/__init__.py\nsrc/miniqueue/api_app.py\nsrc/miniqueue/backoff.py\nsrc/miniqueue/broker.py\nsrc/miniqueue/cli.py\nsrc/miniqueue/config.py\nsrc/miniqueue/db.py\nsrc/miniqueue/logging.py\nsrc/miniqueue/metrics.py\nsrc/miniqueue/models.py\nsrc/miniqueue/scheduler.py\nsrc/miniqueue/state_machine.py\nsrc/miniqueue/worker.py\nsrc/miniqueue.egg-info/PKG-INFO\nsrc/miniqueue.egg-info/SOURCES.txt\nsrc/miniqueue.egg-info/dependency_links.txt\nsrc/miniqueue.egg-info/entry_points.txt\nsrc/miniqueue.egg-info/requires.txt\nsrc/miniqueue.egg-info/top_level.txt\nsrc/miniqueue/tasks/__init__.py\nsrc/miniqueue/tasks/builtin_tasks.py"

    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "fastapi>=0.115.0\nuvicorn[standard]>=0.30.0\nredis>=5.0.0\nsqlalchemy[asyncio]>=2.0.0\naiosqlite>=0.19.0\npydantic>=2.0.0\npydantic-settings>=2.0.0\ntyper[all]>=0.12.0\nhttpx>=0.27.0\nprometheus-client>=0.20.0\npyyaml>=6.0.0\n\n[dev]\npytest>=8.0.0\npytest-asyncio>=0.23.0\nruff>=0.4.0\nmypy>=1.10.0\ntypes-redis>=4.6.0.20240425\n"

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": {
            "13:I32": 1902734953,
            "14:I32": 174421349
          }
        },
        "2:LEN": "a1c2945eafe8232922533fd919237779eac32eb38ff511a3599bb808d9f7e47d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"

      ],

    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "Metadata-Version: 2.4\r\nName: miniqueue\r\nVersion: 0.1.0\r\nSummary: Local, production-style job queue and scheduler (mini Celery)\r\nAuthor-email: MiniQueue System <REDACTED>\r\nLicense: MIT\r\nClassifier: Programming Language :: Python :: 3\r\nClassifier: Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12\r\nClassifier: License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License\r\nClassifier: Operating System :: OS Independent\r\nRequires-Python: >=3.12\r\nDescription-Content-Type: text/markdown\r\nRequires-Dist: fastapi>=0.115.0\r\nRequires-Dist: uvicorn[standard]>=0.30.0\r\nRequires-Dist: redis>=5.0.0\r\nRequires-Dist: sqlalchemy[asyncio]>=2.0.0\r\nRequires-Dist: aiosqlite>=0.19.0\r\nRequires-Dist: pydantic>=2.0.0\r\nRequires-Dist: pydantic-settings>=2.0.0\r\nRequires-Dist: typer[all]>=0.12.0\r\nRequires-Dist: httpx>=0.27.0\r\nRequires-Dist: prometheus-client>=0.20.0\r\nRequires-Dist: pyyaml>=6.0.0\r\nProvides-Extra: dev\r\nRequires-Dist: pytest>=8.0.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\nRequires-Dist: pytest-asyncio>=0.23.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\nRequires-Dist: ruff>=0.4.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\nRequires-Dist: mypy>=1.10.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\nRequires-Dist: types-redis>=4.6.0.20240425; extra == \"dev\"\r\n\r\n ## MiniQueue: Local Job Queue & Scheduler\r\n \r\n **MiniQueue** is a local, production-style job queue and scheduler (a \\\"mini Celery\\\") built to\r\n stress‑test AI coding agents on reliable concurrent system design.\r\n \r\n ### Features\r\n \r\n - **Services**: FastAPI API service, async worker service, scheduler service, plus a Typer CLI.\r\n - **Broker**: Redis Streams with consumer groups and visibility‑timeout style reclaim.\r\n - **Persistence**: SQLite via SQLAlchemy (async) for durable job metadata and job event logs.\r\n - **Observability**: Structured JSON logs and Prometheus metrics across all services.\r\n - **Reliability**: At‑least‑once delivery, retry with exponential backoff + jitter, DLQ, and\r\n   cooperative cancellation for multi‑step tasks.\r\n \r\n ### Quickstart\r\n \r\n ```bash\r\n # From the project root\r\n pip install -e \".[dev]\"\r\n \r\n # Run tests\r\n make test\r\n \r\n # Lint & type-check\r\n make lint\r\n \r\n # Start Redis + API + worker + scheduler\r\n make up\r\n \r\n # Tear everything down\r\n make down\r\n \r\n # Submit load test via CLI\r\n make loadtest\r\n ```\r\n \r\n ### Architecture (High Level)\r\n \r\n - **API service** (`miniqueue.api_app`):\r\n   - FastAPI app exposing JSON endpoints to submit jobs, query status, cancel, retry, and list jobs.\r\n   - Exposes `/metrics` for Prometheus and `/healthz` for liveness/DB/broker checks.\r\n - **Worker service** (`miniqueue.worker`):\r\n   - Async worker loops consuming from Redis Streams consumer group.\r\n   - Executes registered job types, records state transitions in SQLite, and only acknowledges\r\n     stream entries after durable persistence.\r\n - **Scheduler service** (`miniqueue.scheduler`):\r\n   - Periodically enqueues delayed jobs (`run_at` / `next_run_at`) and handles retries.\r\n   - Loads recurring schedules from `config/schedules.yml` and deduplicates ticks via a\r\n     `schedule_ticks` table.\r\n - **CLI** (`miniqueue.cli`):\r\n   - Typer-based CLI for job submission/inspection, tailing events, and running local load tests.\r\n \r\n A detailed description of failure scenarios, design tradeoffs, assumptions, and how to add new\r\n tasks is provided after the core implementation is complete.\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "ecbf07a1b17616891bbb1c5153cf0c5243245f2066ff0d1b274e59ab11f3848f",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 03:20:33 GMT

%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CwAlOzLvCT4Apww%255C%255CcICy1Af8swujOBMiJ-3rHHSO.bMBUt2NlrUIEpn44yzg%255C%255CfxmAshSTkunWZg45X5o.QamjfqBlNrhNlQ%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522fastapi%255Cu003e%3D0.115.0%255Cnuvicorn%255Bstandard%255D%255Cu003e%253D0.30.0%255Cnredis%255Cu003e%253D5.0.0%255Cnsqlalchemy%255Basyncio%255D%255Cu003e%253D2.0.0%255Cnaiosqlite%255Cu003e%253D0.19.0%255Cnpydantic%255Cu003e%253D2.0.0%255Cnpydantic-settings%255Cu003e%253D2.0.0%255Cntyper%255Ball%255D%255Cu003e%253D0.12.0%255Cnhttpx%255Cu003e%253D0.27.0%255Cnprometheus-client%255Cu003e%253D0.20.0%255Cnpyyaml%255Cu003e%253D6.0.0%255Cn%255Cn%255Bdev%255D%255Cnpytest%255Cu003e%253D8.0.0%255Cnpytest-asyncio%255Cu003e%253D0.23.0%255Cnruff%255Cu003e%253D0.4.0%255Cnmypy%255Cu003e%253D1.10.0%255Cntypes-redis%255Cu003e%253D4.6.0.20240425%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522c8504767cbe68b935112eb34e05ff53022cb7f1bab65aea8f5e3debcfd6a69e1%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%252213%253AI32%2522%253A1902734953%252C%252214%253AI32%2522%253A174421349%257D%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522a1c2945eafe8232922533fd919237779eac32eb38ff511a3599bb808d9f7e47d%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522Metadata-Version%25 CnRequires-Dist%253A%2Btypes-redis%255Cu003e%253D4.6.0.20240425%253B%2Bextra%2B%253D%253D%2B%255C%2522dev%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2523%2523%2BMiniQueue%253A%2BLocal%2BJob%2BQueue%2B%255Cu0026%2BScheduler%255Cr%255Cn%2B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%252A%252AMiniQueue%252A%252A%2Bis%2Ba%2Blocal%252C%2Bproduction-style%2Bjob%2Bqueue%2Band%2Bscheduler%2B%2528a%2B%255C%255C%255C%2522mini%2BCelery%255C%255C%255C%2522%2529%2Bbuilt%2Bto%255Cr%255Cn%2Bstress%25E2%2580%2591test%2BAI%2Bcoding%2Bagents%2Bon%2Breliable%2Bconcurrent%2Bsystem%2Bdesign.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2523%2523%2523%2BFeatures%255Cr%255Cn%2B%255Cr%255Cn%2B-%2B%252A%252AServices%252A%252A%253A%2BFastAPI%2BAPI%2Bservice%252C%2Basync%2Bworker%2Bservice%252C%2Bscheduler%2Bservice%252C%2Bplus%2Ba%2BTyper%2BCLI.%255Cr%255Cn%2B-%2B%252A%252ABroker%252A%252A%253A%2BRedis%2BStreams%2Bwith%2Bconsumer%2Bgroups%2Band%2Bvisibility%25E2%2580%2591timeout%2Bstyle%2Breclaim.%255Cr%255Cn%2B-%2B%252A%252APersistence%252A%252A%253A%2BSQLite%2Bvia%2BSQLAlchemy%2B%2528async%2529%2Bfor%2Bdurable%2Bjob%2Bmetadata%2Band%2Bjob%2Bevent%2Blogs.%255Cr%255Cn%2B-%2B%252A%252AObservability%252A%252A%253A%2BStructured%2BJSON%2Blogs%2Band%2BPrometheus%2Bmetrics%2Bacross%2Ball%2Bservices.%255Cr%255Cn%2B-%2B%252A%252AReliability%252A%252A%253A%2BAt%25E2%2580%2591least%25E2%2580%2591once%2Bdelivery%252C%2Bretry%2Bwith%2Bexponential%2Bbackoff%2B%2B%2Bjitter%252C%2BDLQ%252C%2Band%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2Bcooperative%2Bcancellation%2Bfor%2Bmulti%25E2%2580%2591step%2Btasks.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2523%2523%2523%2BQuickstart%255Cr%255Cn%2B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2560%2560%2560bash%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2523%2BFrom%2Bthe%2Bproject%2Broot%255Cr%255Cn%2Bpip%2Binstall%2B-e%2B%255C%2522.%255Bdev%255D%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2523%2BRun%2Btests%255Cr%255Cn%2Bmake%2Btest%255Cr%255Cn%2B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2523%2BLint%2B%255Cu0026%2Btype-check%255Cr%255Cn%2Bmake%2Blint%255Cr%255Cn%2B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2523%2BStart%2BRedis%2B%2B%2BAPI%2B%2B%2Bworker%2B%2B%2
